title: Grilled Trout with Ukrainian-Style Silky Sauce
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish combining the delicate taste of trout with the creamy texture of Ukrainian silky sauce, all grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: silky
ingredients.notes: Ukrainian-style silky sauce, store-bought or homemade

ingredients.name: grill
ingredients.notes: Outdoor grill or grill pan for indoor use

ingredients.name: garam masala
ingredients.notes: Ground spice blend commonly used in Indian cuisine

ingredients.name: cumin
ingredients.notes: Ground spice commonly used in Indian cuisine

instructions: Rinse trout fillets under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
Season trout with salt, black pepper, garam masala, and cumin.
Place trout on the grill and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While trout is cooking, heat butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add silky sauce and stir constantly until heated through.
Squeeze lemon juice over the trout and spoon some of the silky sauce over the top.
